tasks.title: Audit apps/web/src/features for incomplete UI and broken flows
tasks.description: Review all feature modules under apps/web/src/features/ including onboarding, dashboard, vocabulary notebook, article library, exercise center, writing idea bank, speaking practice bank, daily study plan, AI settings, import/export, progress tracking, privacy, and settings pages. Identify any placeholder UI, mock data usage outside tests, broken navigation or flows, missing loading/empty/error states, missing form validation, and missing persistence logic. Document all findings with file references and specific issues.
acceptanceCriteria: All feature modules reviewed for UI completeness and flow correctness
List of incomplete UI components, broken flows, and missing states documented

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing incomplete UI, broken flows, missing states, and persistence issues in feature modules

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed findings on UI and flow issues to guide implementation plan

tasks.title: Audit packages/ for domain logic completeness and test coverage
tasks.description: Review all packages under packages/ including learning-engine, ai, ai-tutor, exercises, content, import-export, storage, and others. Identify incomplete or missing business logic, missing or incomplete unit and integration tests, dead code, and missing error handling. Document findings with file references and specific issues.
acceptanceCriteria: All domain packages reviewed for logic completeness and test coverage
List of missing or incomplete logic, tests, and error handling documented

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing missing logic, tests, error handling, and dead code in domain packages

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed findings on domain logic and test gaps to guide implementation plan

tasks.title: Audit apps/web/src/routes and navigation for broken flows and missing states
tasks.description: Review routing configuration and navigation logic in apps/web/src/routes and related files. Identify broken or missing navigation flows, missing loading, empty, and error states on pages, and missing form validation or confirmation dialogs. Document findings with file references and specific issues.
acceptanceCriteria: All routes and navigation flows reviewed for correctness and completeness
List of broken flows, missing states, and missing validations documented

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing broken navigation flows, missing states, and missing validations

metadata.inputContext: Routing and navigation code in apps/web/src/routes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed findings on navigation issues to guide implementation plan

tasks.title: Audit apps/web/src/services/storage and extension scripts for persistence and extension feature completeness
tasks.description: Review storage layer implementation in apps/web/src/services/storage including IndexedDB usage, error handling, and persistence correctness. Review Chrome extension scripts for webpage word highlighting, tooltip, save word/article, selected text menu, sentence explanation, article generation, floating assistant, popup, settings, and YouTube transcript support. Identify missing persistence, error handling, or incomplete extension features. Document findings with file references and specific issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Storage layer reviewed for persistence correctness and error handling
Extension scripts reviewed for feature completeness and isolation
List of missing persistence, error handling, and incomplete extension features documented

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing persistence issues, error handling gaps, and incomplete extension features

metadata.inputContext: Storage services and extension scripts in apps/web/src/services/storage and extension folders
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed findings on persistence and extension feature gaps to guide implementation plan

tasks.title: Audit AI integration and error handling in AI features
tasks.description: Review AI integration code in packages/ai, packages/ai-tutor, and apps/web/src/features/ai-settings and related features. Verify handling of missing API key, loading states, error states, invalid responses, and success states. Identify missing or incomplete error handling and state management. Document findings with file references and specific issues.
acceptanceCriteria: AI features reviewed for complete state handling and error management
List of missing or incomplete AI error handling and state management documented

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing AI integration error handling and state management issues

metadata.inputContext: AI integration code in packages/ai, packages/ai-tutor, and apps/web/src/features/ai-settings
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed findings on AI integration gaps to guide implementation plan

tasks.title: Audit tests for unit, integration, and E2E coverage and correctness
tasks.description: Review existing test suites for unit tests of core logic, integration tests for storage, AI prompt builders, vocabulary detection, article extraction, exercise parsing, and daily task generation, and E2E tests for key user flows including onboarding, saving words and articles, highlighting, selected text actions, exercise generation, vocabulary review, data export/import, extension popup and settings. Identify missing or broken tests and coverage gaps. Document findings with file references and specific issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Test suites reviewed for coverage and correctness
List of missing, broken, or incomplete tests documented

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing test coverage gaps and broken tests

metadata.inputContext: Test suites in tests/ and apps/web/src/features
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed findings on test gaps to guide implementation plan

tasks.title: Audit build scripts, lint, and typecheck for errors and warnings
tasks.description: Review build scripts, lint configuration, and TypeScript configuration. Run build, lint, and typecheck commands to identify errors, warnings, or misconfigurations. Document findings and any required fixes to ensure successful builds and clean lint/typecheck results.
acceptanceCriteria: Build, lint, and typecheck run without errors or warnings
List of build or configuration issues documented
tasks.expectedResult: Build completes successfully, lint and typecheck show no errors or warnings

outputPlan.description: Audit report listing build, lint, and typecheck issues

metadata.inputContext: Build scripts, lint and TypeScript configuration
evidence: exit code 0 from build, lint, typecheck
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures build and code quality tools are correctly configured and passing

tasks.title: Compile comprehensive implementation plan based on audit reports
tasks.description: Analyze all audit reports from previous tasks to create a detailed implementation plan. The plan must list all required fixes, feature completions, refactorings, test additions, and build improvements. Prioritize tasks by risk and dependencies. Include clear deliverables, acceptance criteria, and estimated effort for each implementation task.
acceptanceCriteria: Implementation plan covers all audit findings
Plan includes prioritized tasks with clear deliverables and acceptance criteria

outputPlan.description: Detailed implementation plan for completing and productionizing IELTS Journey features

metadata.inputContext: Audit reports from all previous analysis tasks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear roadmap for completing and stabilizing the project
